2026-05-01T20:01:13.5092434Z ##[group]Run # Determine mode from input or schedule
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5093228Z [36;1m# Determine mode from input or schedule[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5093840Z [36;1mif [ -n "$INPUT_MODE" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5094361Z [36;1m  MODE="$INPUT_MODE"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5094873Z [36;1melif [ "$SCHEDULE" = "0 7 * * *" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5095433Z [36;1m  MODE=current[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5095924Z [36;1melif [ "$SCHEDULE" = "0 17 * * *" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5097072Z [36;1m  MODE=latest[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5097515Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5097888Z [36;1m  MODE=next[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5098280Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5098699Z [36;1mecho "mode=$MODE" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5099225Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5099795Z [36;1m# Read current milestone from VERSIONS.txt via API (no checkout yet)[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5100860Z [36;1mCURRENT=$(gh api "repos/$GITHUB_REPOSITORY/contents/scripts/VERSIONS.txt?ref=$GITHUB_REF" \[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5101948Z [36;1m  --jq '.content' | base64 -d | grep '^libSkiaSharp.*milestone' | awk '{print $NF}')[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5102793Z [36;1mecho "current=$CURRENT" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5103335Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5103711Z [36;1mNEXT=$((CURRENT + 1))[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5104212Z [36;1mecho "next=$NEXT" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5104783Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5105279Z [36;1m# Find latest upstream chrome/m* branch (no clone needed)[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5106241Z [36;1mLATEST=$(git ls-remote --heads https://github.com/google/skia.git 'refs/heads/chrome/m*' \[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5107398Z [36;1m  | sed -n 's|.*refs/heads/chrome/m\([0-9]*\)$|\1|p' \[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5108018Z [36;1m  | sort -n | tail -1)[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5108567Z [36;1mecho "latest=$LATEST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5109110Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5109483Z [36;1m# Pick target[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5109932Z [36;1mif [ "$MODE" = "latest" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5110444Z [36;1m  TARGET="$LATEST"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5110926Z [36;1melif [ "$MODE" = "current" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5111445Z [36;1m  TARGET="$CURRENT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5111878Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5112436Z [36;1m  TARGET="$NEXT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5112869Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5113299Z [36;1mecho "target=$TARGET" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5113839Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5114222Z [36;1m# Verify upstream branch exists[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5115204Z [36;1mif ! git ls-remote --exit-code https://github.com/google/skia.git "refs/heads/chrome/m${TARGET}" >/dev/null 2>&1; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5116317Z [36;1m  echo "::notice::upstream/chrome/m${TARGET} does not exist yet"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5117140Z [36;1m  exit 1[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5117528Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5117877Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5118334Z [36;1m# Check if autobump branch is already up-to-date[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5119364Z [36;1mUPSTREAM_TIP=$(git ls-remote https://github.com/google/skia.git "refs/heads/chrome/m${TARGET}" | awk '{print $1}')[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5120823Z [36;1mBRANCH_TIP=$(git ls-remote https://github.com/mono/skia.git "refs/heads/autobump/skia-m${TARGET}" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5122010Z [36;1mif [ -n "$BRANCH_TIP" ] && [ "$BRANCH_TIP" = "$UPSTREAM_TIP" ]; then[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5122886Z [36;1m  echo "::notice::autobump/skia-m${TARGET} tip matches upstream — up-to-date"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5123605Z [36;1m  exit 1[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5123971Z [36;1mfi[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5124316Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5124948Z [36;1mecho "Will process: m${TARGET} (mode=${MODE}, current=m${CURRENT}, latest=m${LATEST})"[0m
2026-05-01T20:01:13.5133676Z shell: /usr/bin/bash -e {0}
